title: Ability to automatically add the item name to the subitem
excerpt: It would be great if there was a way to add the item name in the subitem. I envision it being similar to when you create an automation for a notification you can select what you want to be included in the message (item n…

posts.author: CheyenneN (Cheyenne Norton)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was a way to add the item name in the subitem. I envision it being similar to when you create an automation for a notification you can select what you want to be included in the message (item name, person, dates, etc) Right now we are just coping and pasting the item name in each subitem. Our projects have 8-15 subitems so it could really save us some time. Thank you!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @CheyenneN
We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-06-17 at 16.12.452058×348 29.2 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: CheyenneN (Cheyenne Norton)
posts.cookedHtml: This is exactly what I was needing. Thank you so much!!

posts.author: Ordan (Ordan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, is it possible to use the app in this scenario:
when status changes in subitem add the name of its parent item as a prefix…
